revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-3-400

The degradation of metal by electro-chemical action, usually oxidation.


Note: For some metals initial surface oxidation may be beneficial in preventing further oxidation.

{{IALAFooter}}
